content_fingerprint: openai and pwc partner to bring ai agents to enterprise finance functions openai and the professional services firm pwc have announced a collaboration aimed at deploying ai agents inside enterprise finance departments targeting cfo workflows including forecasting controls automation and financial reporting modernization openai and pwc have announced a partnership focused on integrating ai agents into the office of the chief financial officer at enterprise clients the collaboration is positioned around helping finance teams automate repetitive workflows improve the accuracy of financial forecas
